title: 2.4 GHz rectangular patch antenna
description: Create, validate, run, and inspect the narrow uniform-Yee FR4 patch resonance and one-port S11 workflow.

expected_metrics.observable: relative error of the TM010 resonance frequency
maximum one-port |S11| over the declared band
expected_metrics.reference: passive one-port bound with numerical margin

ui_journey.acceptance: Create a new immutable patch experiment revision from the golden input.
Change patch length or feed inset through a typed field and show a semantic diff.
Show substrate, finite ground, patch, and feed overlay without a solve.
Show coded preflight issues and block on error-severity findings.
Approve and launch a CPU worker linked to the immutable revision.
Show S11, Smith chart availability, resonance metric, validation state, and field slice availability.
Export a checksum-verified bundle containing spec, code, events, metrics, and limitations.

limitations: The claims-bearing lane is narrow patch resonance evidence, not broad absolute wire-port S-parameter calibration.
The bundled CPU smoke spec proves lifecycle and artifact behavior only; it is not a quantitative RF reference.
The analytic estimate omits finite-ground and probe-feed loading, so tolerance-based rather than bitwise replay is required.
